name: createOneTimeLoginToken
description: Creates a one-time token using API-key authenticated context. Response `example_links` put the token in the URL fragment (`#one-time-login-token=...`) so static hosts and cross-origin Referer headers do not receive the secret; the user-webapp redeems it via POST. The webapp does not read the token from the query string.

name: createTicket
description: Opens a ticket (a feedback or help/support message) on behalf of the API key's user. The user identity is taken from the API key and the email is resolved server-side, so only `message` (and optional `type`) are sent in the body. `type` defaults to `help_support`. Returns **400** if the user account has no email address, and **404** if the API key's user account cannot be found.

type.description: Ticket category. Defaults to `help_support` when omitted.

name: getBillingBalance
description: Returns read-only billing balance fields for the API key tenant.

name: listScenarios
description: Lists scenario rows with optional `scenario_type`, `status`, `limit`, and `offset` filters. Default `limit` upstream is 100 (max 1000).

status.description: Repeatable filter on scenario row `status`. Values: `INIT`, `PROCESSING`, `SUCCESS`, `FAILED`, `CANCELLED`. `SUCCESS` means the scenario is materialised and runnable (`definition_bucket_path` set and scenario JSON uploaded). Use `scenario_creation_job_status` on list/get responses to track in-flight generation jobs.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return (pagination page size).

offset.description: Number of records to skip from the beginning of the sorted result set.

name: createScenario
description:
**Step 1 of a 2-step JSON import.** Creates an empty environment row synchronously (no `scenario_creation` job). The scenario is **not runnable** until step 2: uploading the definition via `PATCH /v1/scenarios/{uuid}/artifacts`. Starting a run on a shell before the artifacts are uploaded returns **409 `scenario_definition_missing`** from `/v1/engine/simulate/scenario` and `/v1/engine/workspace-credit-preview`. Use `scenario_type: info_exchange` for JSON imports. Sending `corpus_uuid` returns **400**. `job_uuid` in the response is null. Prefer `POST /v1/scenarios/generate` if you want a fully-formed scenario in one call.
**Developer-only:** requires the API-key owner's Auth0 user to have the platform `developer` role (enforced by the gateway via Auth0 Management API).

name.description: Display name (unique per workspace after normalisation upstream).

scenario_type.description: Dialogue kind stored on the row when known at create time.

tags.description: Optional workspace tags stored on the environment.

creation_parameters.description: Optional opaque creation metadata persisted on the environment.

name: generateScenario
description: Queues LLM scenario_creation work. Returns the environment row (`uuid`, not `scenario_uuid`) plus `job_uuid`. When num_scenarios is greater than 1, creates a batch (`batch_uuid`, `batch_scenario_uuids`) and requires `tag_pool`. Runs a billing credit preflight before enqueueing (**402** when balance is insufficient, **502** when billing is unreachable). Tenant UUIDs are injected by the gateway from the API key. Use the returned `uuid` as the `scenario_uuid` path parameter on `/v1/scenarios/{scenario_uuid}/...`.

scenario_type.description: Multi-agent `info_exchange` (default) or 1-to-1 `interview`. Controls tag caps and NPC layout.

context_prompt.description: Optional context to guide generation (info_exchange and interview).

tags.description: Explicit skill tag `name` values from GET /web/api/v1/tags. At most 5 (info_exchange) or 2 (interview). Each tag's `allowed_scenario_types` must include your `scenario_type`. Invalid tags fail on the async job, not synchronously.

num_scenarios.description: Batch size. 1 = single scenario. Greater than 1 requires tag_pool and returns uuid, batch_uuid, and batch_scenario_uuids on the response.

tag_pool.description: Required when num_scenarios > 1; universe of tag `name` values to sample from. Each entry must allow your `scenario_type` per the tag catalogue.

include_tags.description: Batch only; tags required in every scenario. Must be a subset of tag_pool. total_tags must be at least the number of distinct include_tags.

total_tags.description: Batch only; tags drawn per scenario from tag_pool (default len(tag_pool)). Capped at 5 info_exchange / 2 interview.

max_tags_per_npc.description: Batch only; caps tags per NPC. NPC count = ceil(total_tags / max_tags_per_npc). Ignored for interview (single NPC). Worker default 1 when omitted.

name: getScenario
description: Returns scenario metadata, definition paths, optional `scenario_creation_job_status`, complexity fields, etc.

scenario_uuid.description: UUID of a simulation environment in the authenticated workspace. Use the `uuid` field from scenario create, generate, list, or get responses (not a response field named `scenario_uuid`).

name: updateScenario
description: Partial metadata update (name and description only).

scenario_uuid.description: UUID of a simulation environment in the authenticated workspace. Use the `uuid` field from scenario create, generate, list, or get responses (not a response field named `scenario_uuid`).

name.description: New display name (workspace uniqueness enforced upstream).

name: deleteScenario
description: Deletes the scenario in the current workspace context. Returns **409** when the scenario still has any non-deleted simulation run pointing at it.

scenario_uuid.description: UUID of a simulation environment in the authenticated workspace. Use the `uuid` field from scenario create, generate, list, or get responses (not a response field named `scenario_uuid`).

name: generateScenarioCopy
description: Replays `creation_parameters` from the source scenario through the same LLM generation path as `POST /v1/scenarios/generate`. Response shape matches generate (`uuid`, `job_uuid`, optional batch fields). Returns **400** when the source has no saved creation snapshot. Tenant scope is injected from the API key (query on upstream).

scenario_uuid.description: UUID of a simulation environment in the authenticated workspace. Use the `uuid` field from scenario create, generate, list, or get responses (not a response field named `scenario_uuid`).

name: copyScenario
description: Duplicates storage (`scenario.json` when present) into a new environment row in the same workspace. Optional `new_name` query parameter; default name is `{original} (Copy)` with numeric suffixes when needed.

scenario_uuid.description: UUID of a simulation environment in the authenticated workspace. Use the `uuid` field from scenario create, generate, list, or get responses (not a response field named `scenario_uuid`).

new_name.description: Optional new display name when copying an environment in-place.

name: getScenarioJob
description: Returns all non-deleted jobs for the environment (newest first), including `scenario_creation` and other job types.

scenario_uuid.description: UUID of a simulation environment in the authenticated workspace. Use the `uuid` field from scenario create, generate, list, or get responses (not a response field named `scenario_uuid`).

name: getScenarioArtifacts
description: Downloads `scenario.json` (or legacy `benchmark.json` for corpus-linked rows) from storage. **404** when `definition_bucket_path` is unset or the file is missing.

scenario_uuid.description: UUID of a simulation environment in the authenticated workspace. Use the `uuid` field from scenario create, generate, list, or get responses (not a response field named `scenario_uuid`).

name: patchScenarioArtifacts
description:
Replaces the entire `scenario.json` object in storage with the request body (full document upload, not a deep merge). Requires `definition_bucket_path` on the environment.
**Developer-only:** requires the API-key owner's Auth0 user to have the platform `developer` role (enforced by the gateway via Auth0 Management API).

scenario_uuid.description: UUID of a simulation environment in the authenticated workspace. Use the `uuid` field from scenario create, generate, list, or get responses (not a response field named `scenario_uuid`).

name: listJobs
description: Lists async jobs for the workspace (scenario creation, engine simulation runs, evaluations, etc.) with optional `current_status` filter and pagination.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return (pagination page size).

offset.description: Number of records to skip from the beginning of the sorted result set.

current_status.description: Filter jobs whose `current_status` equals this value (exact string match). Values: `PENDING`, `PROCESSING`, `COMPLETED`, `FAILED`, `CANCELLED`.

name: getJob
description: Returns one job by UUID — current status, progress, and error details.

job_uuid.description: UUID of an async job (creation, engine, evaluation, etc.) in the workspace.

name: deleteJob
description: Deletes a job record. Typically allowed only for terminal states (`COMPLETED`, `FAILED`, `CANCELLED`).

job_uuid.description: UUID of an async job (creation, engine, evaluation, etc.) in the workspace.

name: retryJob
description: Submits a retry for a `FAILED` or retriable job in the workspace context.

job_uuid.description: UUID of an async job (creation, engine, evaluation, etc.) in the workspace.

name: listAgents
description: Lists agents registered in the workspace with optional type filter and pagination.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return (pagination page size).

offset.description: Number of records to skip from the beginning of the sorted result set.

name: createAgent
description: Registers an agent endpoint (A2A, API, etc.) for use in simulations and tests.

name.description: Display name for the registered agent. Must be unique within the workspace; if the requested name is taken, the server assigns the next available suffix (e.g. My Agent (1)).

description.description: Optional notes about the agent’s role or integration.

agent_url.description: Base URL for A2A/API agents, or connection entrypoint as required by agent_type.

agent_parameters.description: Connector-specific settings (timeouts, headers, tools, auth hints, etc.). Shape depends on agent_type; see product docs for supported keys.

name: getAgent
description: Returns a single agent definition including URL and parameters.

agent_uuid.description: UUID of a registered workspace agent.

name: updateAgent
description: Partially updates agent settings (name, URL, agent_parameters).

agent_uuid.description: UUID of a registered workspace agent.

name.description: New display name for the agent. Must be unique within the workspace; if the requested name is taken, the server assigns the next available suffix (e.g. My Agent (1)).

agent_url.description: Updated endpoint URL when the deployment location changes.

agent_type.description: Switch connector type when migrating how VerifyAX talks to the agent.

agent_parameters.description: Merged or replaced connector settings (upstream merge rules apply).

name: deleteAgent
description: Removes the agent from the workspace registry.

agent_uuid.description: UUID of a registered workspace agent.

name: testAgentCard
description: Validates connectivity by fetching an A2A-style agent card URL through the gateway connector.

agent_url.description: Absolute URL of the `.well-known` agent card or root to fetch.

agent_type.description: Connector hint; defaults to A2A card discovery semantics.

agent_parameters.description: Optional extra parameters passed to the connector (timeouts, headers, etc.).

name: testRestAgent
description: Sends a configurable HTTP request to a REST agent and returns the proxied response for debugging.

url.description: Fully qualified URL to invoke (method applied as given).

method.description: HTTP verb (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, …).

body.description: Optional JSON object body for non-GET calls; arbitrary keys are forwarded upstream.

timeout.description: Per-request timeout in seconds enforced server-side.

name: testCurlAgent
description: Executes a curl-style agent definition server-side with a timeout for integration checks.

curl_command.description: Full curl command line as a single string (quoting rules apply server-side).

timeout.description: Maximum seconds to wait for the proxied curl execution.

name: previewWorkspaceCredits
description: Unified credit preview: organisation balance, pending ENGINE verification runs and scenario_creation jobs (with stored estimates), and either `newRunEstimatedCredits` (`mode: scenario_run`) or `newGenerationEstimatedCredits` (`mode: scenario_generation`). The estimate field that does not apply is `null`. Tenant UUIDs in the body are overwritten by the gateway from the API key (see API overview).

mode.description: Select run-cost estimate vs scenario batch-generation estimate.

scenario_uuid.description: Required when `mode` is `scenario_run` — target simulation environment (the scenario row’s `uuid` from create or generate, passed here as `scenario_uuid`).

num_runs.description: Required when `mode` is `scenario_run` — number of planned runs to price.

agent_uuid.description: Optional agent hint for run-cost estimates (registry agent UUID).

timeout_minutes.description: scenario_run: overrides simulation_config.timeout_minutes for the credit estimate. scenario_generation: generation time budget (mirrors scenario create). Omit for defaults.

num_scenarios.description: Required when `mode` is `scenario_generation` — number of scenario creates to price.

name: simulateScenario
description: Starts a scenario simulation; supports evaluate_on_complete and multiple runs.

scenario_uuid.description: Single scenario simulation environment to run against — the scenario row’s `uuid` from create or generate responses.

environment_uuids.description: Ordered list of scenario environments to run in one request. Mutually exclusive with `environment_uuid`; must contain at least one UUID when used.

agent_uuid.description: Registered workspace agent to exercise. The gateway resolves URL, connector strategy, and auth from this agent before starting the simulation.

evaluate_on_complete.description: When true, queue evaluation automatically after the run completes successfully.

num_runs.description: Number of parallel runs for robustness. Defaults to 1.

timeout_minutes.description: Optional wall-clock budget in minutes for this verification run. Overrides simulation_config.timeout_minutes in the scenario definition for billing and playground execution. Workbench UI presets 5–60 min.

name: triggerEvaluation
description: Queues evaluation for a simulation run in `COMPLETED` status. Skip this if you set `evaluate_on_complete` on the trigger call.

simulation_uuid.description: Verification run to evaluate (`simulation_uuid` from the run record).

name: listSimulations
description: Paginated simulation search with rich filters (status, dates, run group, evaluation flags).

agent_uuid.description: Restrict verification runs or lists to this registered workspace agent UUID.

status.description: Filter verification runs whose `status` equals this value. Values: `CREATED`, `IN_PROGRESS`, `COMPLETED`, `FAILED`, `CANCELLED`.

run_group_uuid.description: Return runs that belong to this batched / multi-environment run group UUID.

date_from.description: Lower bound on run `created_at` or comparable timestamp (inclusive).

date_to.description: Upper bound on run `created_at` or comparable timestamp (inclusive).

search.description: Free-text filter applied to run metadata or identifiers (upstream-defined).

has_single_evaluation.description: When true, restrict to runs that have exactly one linked evaluation job.

group_by_run_group.description: When true, collapse list results to one row per `run_group_uuid` (upstream semantics).

include_evaluation_jobs.description: When true, embed evaluation job summaries on each listed run (heavier payload).

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return (pagination page size).

offset.description: Number of records to skip from the beginning of the sorted result set.

name: listSimulationsByScenario
description: Returns simulations that ran against a specific scenario with optional agent and status filters.

scenario_uuid.description: UUID of a simulation environment in the authenticated workspace. Use the `uuid` field from scenario create, generate, list, or get responses (not a response field named `scenario_uuid`).

agent_uuid.description: Restrict verification runs or lists to this registered workspace agent UUID.

status.description: Filter verification runs whose `status` equals this value. Values: `CREATED`, `IN_PROGRESS`, `COMPLETED`, `FAILED`, `CANCELLED`.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return (pagination page size).

offset.description: Number of records to skip from the beginning of the sorted result set.

name: getSimulationEvaluationBySimulationId
description: Returns the latest evaluation payload for a simulation UUID.

name: getSimulationEvaluationScores
description: Returns per-tag and overall score aggregates for the latest evaluation on a simulation.

name: getBatchSimulationScores
description: Returns score breakdowns for multiple simulation UUIDs.

ids.description: Simulation UUIDs. Supports repeated params (`?ids=a&ids=b`) or comma separated values (`?ids=a,b`).

name: getSimulationEvaluation
description: Downloads evaluation results for a job UUID including aggregated scores and payloads when ready.

item_identifier.description: Optional opaque item key when downloading evaluation payloads (upstream-specific).

name: getSimulation
description: Returns full run detail including nested evaluation job references.

simulation_uuid.description: Identifier of a **verification run**. Use the `simulation_uuid` returned when starting a run or listed under `GET /v1/simulations`.

name: deleteSimulation
description: Permanently removes a simulation record when allowed by policy.

simulation_uuid.description: Identifier of a **verification run**. Use the `simulation_uuid` returned when starting a run or listed under `GET /v1/simulations`.

name: cancelSimulation
description: Cancels a still-active simulation and returns a cancellation result envelope.

simulation_uuid.description: Identifier of a **verification run**. Use the `simulation_uuid` returned when starting a run or listed under `GET /v1/simulations`.

name: downloadSimulationFile
description: Downloads a binary artifact persisted for a simulation run (transcripts, evidence files, evaluation artifacts). The `path` query parameter is relative to the run directory and must start with `files/` (for example `files/messages/round_1/1_report.pdf`). Tenant scope is derived from your API key, so `organization_uuid`/`workspace_uuid` are not supplied.

simulation_uuid.description: Identifier of a **verification run**. Use the `simulation_uuid` returned when starting a run or listed under `GET /v1/simulations`.

path.description: Relative path under the run directory; must start with `files/`.

name: listAuditLogs
description: Lists organization audit log entries with optional date range, actor, and action filters.

from.description: Start timestamp (inclusive). Must be provided with `to`.

to.description: End timestamp (inclusive). Must be provided with `from`.

actor.description: Actor identifier (user UUID or API key prefix).

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return (pagination page size).

offset.description: Number of records to skip from the beginning of the sorted result set.

name: listUsageEvents
description: Lists billing or analytics usage events with filters for product area, related resource IDs, and pagination.

product_area.description: Filter usage events by billing product area code (ENGINE, SCENARIO_CREATION, etc.).

failed.description: When set, return only failed (`true`) or only successful (`false`) usage events.

event_start_from.description: Lower bound on usage event start timestamp (inclusive).

event_start_to.description: Upper bound on usage event start timestamp (inclusive).

simulation_uuid.description: Filter usage events linked to a specific verification run.

job_uuid.description: Filter usage events to those emitted for this async job UUID.

scenario_uuid.description: Filter usage events or other lists to this simulation environment UUID.

simulation_job_uuid.description: Filter usage events tied to this scenario-creation or simulation job identifier string.

evaluation_job_uuid.description: Filter usage events associated with this evaluation job UUID.

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return (pagination page size).

offset.description: Number of records to skip from the beginning of the sorted result set.

name: getUsageEvent
description: Fetches one usage event by its identifier for drill-down or reconciliation.

name: listUsageCalls
description: Lists model or provider call rows (token usage, latency) scoped by event or model filters.

event_uuid.description: When listing usage calls, restrict to rows for this parent usage event UUID.

provider_name.description: Filter usage calls by LLM provider name (e.g. OpenAI, Anthropic).

model_name.description: Filter usage calls by model id or display name string.

call_start_from.description: Lower bound on per-call start timestamp when listing usage calls (inclusive).

call_start_to.description: Upper bound on per-call start timestamp when listing usage calls (inclusive).

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return (pagination page size).

offset.description: Number of records to skip from the beginning of the sorted result set.

name: validateJsonPayload
description: Validates a JSON **string** against the scenario input model (`schema: scenario`, default). Always returns **200** with a human-readable `result` field (`VALID` / `INVALID` and error lines); malformed JSON or schema violations are expressed in `result`, not via 4xx.

schema.description: Validator id. Use `scenario` (validates scenario input via Pydantic; same model as GET /v1/validation/schema/scenario).

name: getValidationSchemaScenario
description: Returns the canonical scenario JSON Schema document for client-side or offline validation.

name: listSkillTags
description:
Returns the scenario skill tag catalogue used by scenario generation, as a bare JSON array. The organization is derived from your API key, so the response is the global catalogue merged with your organization's custom tag overlay. Custom (org-scoped) tags are flagged with `custom: true`; global tags carry `custom: false`.
Before `POST /v1/scenarios/generate`, filter for tags whose `allowed_scenario_types` includes your `scenario_type`. Tag existence and compatibility are validated asynchronously by the `scenario_creation` worker, so invalid tags yield **201** then a **FAILED** job, not a synchronous **400**.
